name: support-ticket-dashboard
description: Support ticket dashboard — React + Express + PostgreSQL monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
